name: thigh
description: Origin at the greater trochanter. x-axis points distally along the femoral shaft. y-axis points anteriorly. z-axis points medially.

name: grid1
description: 3x4 grid over right vastus lateralis. Origin at electrode E1 (top-left corner). x-axis points distally, y-axis points laterally. For intramuscular entries, z represents insertion depth positive into the muscle.

name: lowerLeg
description: Origin at the medial malleolus. x-axis points proximally along the tibial shaft. y-axis points laterally. z-axis points anteriorly.

description: 3x3 grid over proximal right tibialis anterior. Origin at electrode E1 (top-left corner). x-axis points distally, y-axis points laterally.

name: grid2
description: 3x3 grid over distal right tibialis anterior. Origin at electrode E10 (top-left corner). x-axis points distally, y-axis points laterally.
